chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-285 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 30.04.2025 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh, assisted by Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh a/w Fida Hussain Magsi, Town Officer, Mirokhan, Israr Ahmed, Accountant, Town Committee, Mirokhan, Athar Ali Jokhio, Branch Manager, Sindh Bank Limited, Shahadadkot and SIP Zulfiquar Ali Mugheri on behalf of S.S.P. Kamber- Shahadadkot. Mr. Muhammad Ashique Dhamraho, Advocate for Respondent No.3. ------ The process issued against the respondents returned served by SIP Zulfiquar Ali Mugheri, taken on record. The Town Officer as well as Accountant, Town Committee, Mirokhan are present in person alongwith Cheque No.52191633, dated 30.04.2025 amounting to Rs.1,49,168/-, which has been handed over to the petitioner in Court against his acknowledgment. The Town Officer, Mirokhan has also handed over original service book, duly verified and maintained/upto date, to the petitioner in Court. Learned counsel for the petitioner in view of above compliance submits that since purpose of instant petition has been served, therefore, seeks its disposal. Other side has no objection. Learned counsel for respondent No.3 submits that vide order dated 17.04.2025, Accounts being maintained by Town Committee, Mirokhan were directed to be attached and since the compliance has been made, therefore, the Accounts may be resumed/de-attached so that business of the Town Committee, Mirokhan may be continued.

Other side has no objection. Learned counsel for respondent No.3 submits that vide order dated 17.04.2025, Accounts being maintained by Town Committee, Mirokhan were directed to be attached and since the compliance has been made, therefore, the Accounts may be resumed/de-attached so that business of the Town Committee, Mirokhan may be continued. Admittedly, the respondents have made compliance of the directions issued by this Court; hence Order dated 17.04.2025 is hereby modified and directions issued for attachment of the Accounts duly maintained by Town Committee, Mirokhan are hereby recalled. The Branch Manager, Sindh Bank Limited, Shahadadkot is directed to entertain the transactions of Town Committee, Mirokhan including cheque of the petitioner that has been given to him in the Court today. Respondent No.3 further undertakes that they will disburse salary to the petitioner on monthly basis as per their budgetary provisions and schedule. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge Manzoor
